title: Dolphin Canvas & Tarps: Leaders in custom canvas and PVC solutions
description: BUSINESS NEWS - For more than 16 years,...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - For more than 16 years, Dolphin Canvas & Tarps has been at the forefront of delivering durable, tailor-made solutions in canvas and PVC manufacturing.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - For more than 16 years, Dolphin Canvas & Tarps has been at the forefront of delivering durable, tailor-made solutions in canvas and PVC manufacturing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Based in Mossel Bay, the company has built a reputation for quality craftsmanship, reliability, and customer-focused service - becoming a trusted name across South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From protective tarpaulins and custom covers to marine upholstery and outdoor accessories, Dolphin Canvas & Tarps continues to combine innovation and expertise to meet the diverse needs of individuals, businesses, and industries nationwide.","html":"From protective tarpaulins and custom covers to marine upholstery and outdoor accessories, Dolphin Canvas & Tarps continues to combine innovation and expertise to meet the diverse needs of individuals, businesses, and industries nationwide."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Company overview:Dolphin Canvas & Tarps Pty Ltd is a leading Canvas & PVC Manufacturing & Supply company with over 16 years of industry experience. Specializing in tarpaulins, canvas products, boating upholstery, and custom covers. We provide high-quality, tailor-made solutions to meet the unique needs of our customer.","html":"Company overview:
Dolphin Canvas & Tarps Pty Ltd is a leading Canvas & PVC Manufacturing & Supply company with over 16 years of industry experience. Specializing in tarpaulins, canvas products, boating upholstery, and custom covers. We provide high-quality, tailor-made solutions to meet the unique needs of our customer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With extensive expertise in manufacturing, Dolphin Canvas and Tarps Pty Ltd has established itself as the supplier of choice in South Africa. Our commitment to quality, durability, and customer satisfaction makes us a trusted partner for individuals, transport companies, and the Boating industry.","html":"With extensive expertise in manufacturing, Dolphin Canvas and Tarps Pty Ltd has established itself as the supplier of choice in South Africa. Our commitment to quality, durability, and customer satisfaction makes us a trusted partner for individuals, transport companies, and the Boating industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Products and services:","html":"Products and services:"},{"type":"list","items":["PVC Tarpaulins & Ripstop Canvas Covers","Boat and Car Covers","Marine and Car Upholstery","Custom-made tarps and covers","Camping and Off-road Accessories","Truck & Trailer Covers","Industrial & Agricultural Covers","Shade Solutions & Protective Covers"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our mission is to provide durable, high-quality canvas and tarp solutions that meet the unique needs of our customers, while maintaining excellent service and craftsmanship. At the same time, we remain committed to our vision of becoming the leading supplier of custom ripstop and PVC canvas products in the Mossel Bay region and beyond, recognized for innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction.","html":"Our mission is to provide durable, high-quality canvas and tarp solutions that meet the unique needs of our customers, while maintaining excellent service and craftsmanship. At the same time, we remain committed to our vision of becoming the leading supplier of custom ripstop and PVC canvas products in the Mossel Bay region and beyond, recognized for innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our target market spans a wide range of sectors, including transport and logistics companies, boating and marine industries, agriculture and farming, as well as industrial and commercial businesses. We also cater to individuals who require custom protective covers, along with outdoor enthusiasts and campers.","html":"Our target market spans a wide range of sectors, including transport and logistics companies, boating and marine industries, agriculture and farming, as well as industrial and commercial businesses. We also cater to individuals who require custom protective covers, along with outdoor enthusiasts and campers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Why choose us:","html":"Why choose us:"},{"type":"list","items":["Custom-Made Solutions – Every product is designed to meet your specific needs.","Durable & High-Quality Materials – We use premium PVC, Canvas, and Upholstery materials.","Reliable & Experienced – Over 16 years of industry expertise.","Nationwide Reach – Serving clients across South Africa.","Customer-Focused Service – We prioritize quality craftsmanship and satisfaction."],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Contact information:"},{"type":"list","items":["Location: 1 Bolton Road, Unit 3, Die Voorbaai, Mossel Bay","Tel: 062 086 8149","Email: [email protected]","Website: www.dolphincanvas.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
